# Jungle Thrill Africa

> Jungle Thrill Africa is a personal Tanzania safari planning service led by Hugo, a Tanzania-based safari camp manager with 10+ years on the ground in East African hospitality. He plans bespoke luxury Tanzania safaris one-to-one — no call centre, no middlemen — with an unhurried "slow safari" philosophy (a minimum of three nights in each place). Every journey is custom and priced as a range. Specialities include the northern circuit (Serengeti, Ngorongoro, Tarangire), the wild and uncrowded southern circuit (Ruaha), and bush-and-beach combinations ending in Zanzibar.

## Plan a safari
- [Journeys (tailor-made itineraries)](https://junglethrill.africa/journeys): Honeymoon, family, photographic and slow-luxury Tanzania safari journeys — all customisable starting points.
- [Contact / Plan your safari](https://junglethrill.africa/contact): Message Hugo directly to start planning a custom Tanzania safari.
- [About Hugo](https://junglethrill.africa/about): Hugo's story — a Tanzania camp manager who personally plans every trip.

## Destinations
- [Ruaha National Park safari](https://junglethrill.africa/destinations/ruaha): Tanzania's largest, least-crowded park in the southern circuit — wild, remote, exceptional predator viewing. Hugo's flagship recommendation for a wilder, quieter safari.
- [Serengeti safari](https://junglethrill.africa/destinations/serengeti): Iconic plains, the Great Migration, and the best big-cat viewing in Africa.
- [Ngorongoro Crater safari](https://junglethrill.africa/destinations/ngorongoro): A self-contained ecosystem inside a vast caldera — Big Five often possible in a single morning.
- [Tarangire safari](https://junglethrill.africa/destinations/tarangire): Giant elephant herds and ancient baobabs, far from the crowds.
- [All destinations](https://junglethrill.africa/destinations): Tanzania's parks and the Zanzibar coast.

## Good to know
- Brand voice: warm, first-person, philosophical — Hugo speaks directly to travellers.
- Markets served: high-value travellers from the US, Western Europe, Australia, Canada and Asia.
- Pricing: always quoted as a range; every safari is tailor-made.
- Contact: enquiries@junglethrill.africa · WhatsApp +255 655 260 925
